title: Working status should allow multiple dates or ranges for upcoming OOO/vacation dates
excerpt: At the moment, I can only set my working status to be OOO for one selected future date or date range. This helps my overall team by showing in the workload view that I will be OOO and coverage must be coordinated. It wou…

posts.author: Brittany (Brittany C)
posts.cookedHtml: At the moment, I can only set my working status to be OOO for one selected future date or date range. This helps my overall team by showing in the workload view that I will be OOO and coverage must be coordinated. It would be great if we could enter all future PTO/OOO time so that our creative operations team who manage resourcing can plan ahead.
